name: Royal Philips
description: Royal Philips is a leading global health technology company dedicated to improving people's health and well-being through meaningful innovation. With a history spanning over 130 years, the company focuses on delivering integrated solutions across the health continuum, including healthy living, diagnosis, treatment, and home care. Headquartered in Amsterdam, Philips leverages advanced technology, clinical expertise, and consumer insights to provide innovative solutions for healthcare providers and patients alike. The company is committed to sustainable business practices and aims to enhance the quality of life for billions of people worldwide through its diverse portfolio of medical and consumer health products.
